name: Bean Sprouts & Green Onions
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the walnut oil in a wok or large non-stick skillet.
2. Rinse the bean sprouts under cold water.
3. Saute the green onions for about 3 minutes until they are softened.
4. Add the sprouts to the pan and heat through, stirring occasionally.
5. Mix in the soy sauce.
6. Garnish with parsley and sunflower seeds.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE + 1 FAT EXCHANGE
CAL: 55
CHO: 0mg; CAR: 5g; PRO: 2g; SOD: 154mg; FAT: 4g
